one_liner: Interactive React carousel showcasing the Top 5 MCP servers 7-figure businesses run on — Lagos Noir design language.

source.note: React component; build/serve from modules/mcp-carousel. See its package.json.

runtime.note: Front-end component, not an HTTP engine. npm install && build inside the module.
